## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Feature Branch
- Branch: `feat-...`
- Scope: (auth / offline / goals / settings / cicd)

## Changes
- [ ] UI changes
- [ ] Logic changes
- [ ] Data model / DB changes
- [ ] CI/CD changes

## Testing
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Manual test on device/emulator

## Screenshots (if UI)
- Before:
- After:

## Notes
- Risk / migration / follow-up
